title: Glass Pane Trade Guaranteed
description: A mod that makes cartographers always trade glass pane at level 2
body:
Since [Minecraft 1.21.5 villager trade rebalance](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_25w07a) cartographers don't always offer glass pane trade when you level up.

- This mod restores old behaviour of cartographers so they always offer glass pane.
- Rest of the trades are the same as vanilla.

Warning! This mod clears all other offers that can be traded at cartographer level 2
